title: Stefan Meyer-Kahlen
text: Home * People * Stefan Meyer-Kahlen Stefan Meyer-Kahlen [1] Stefan Meyer-Kahlen , a German computer scientist, professional computer chess programmer, and author of Shredder [2] . In the early 90s Stefan started chess programming and co-authored XXXX in cooperation with his fellow Martin Zentner . He began to develop his own program Shredder in early 1995. After winning the WMCCC 1996 in Djakarta, he started his professional career. Along with SOS author Rudolf Huber , Stefan Meyer-Kahlen designed the UCI protocol, released in 2000 [3] .
